Access GCCCD

Shared responsibility.
Shared success.

Supporting accessible teaching, learning, technology, and communication across the Grossmont-Cuyamaca Community College District.

Everything starts here. Find your role, explore district priorities, access practical resources, stay informed, and connect with the people who can help.

⌕

Start by role

Everyone Can Lead

Accessibility succeeds when leadership is shared. Choose the entry point closest to your work.

Administrators

Explore strategic priorities, accountability, timelines, and progress.

→

Staff

Find practical tools for communications, documents, websites, and workflows.

→

Faculty

Locate Canvas, media, and course-content checklists and training links.

→

Web Editors

Use standards, templates, and review steps for public-facing content.

→

Students

Looking for accommodations or student services? Start here.

→

Countdown to the ADA Title II Digital Accessibility Deadline

Join the Movement

Access GCCCD exists to coordinate, connect, curate, equip, and measure accessibility work across the district.
